name: Spicy Winter Vegetable Chowder
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces Frozen baby lima beans, thawed
Cilantro or parsley - chopped for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large, heavy saucepan over low heat.
2. Add minced garlic and onion. Cook 8-10 minutes until golden.
3. Stir in turnip cubes, mushrooms, cumin, mint, chili powder, and fennel seeds. Cook 1 minute.
4. Stir in turkey stock and canned tomatoes. Bring to a boil.
5. Cover and simmer 12-15 minutes until vegetables are tender.
6. Stir in remaining turkey stock and thawed lima beans. Cook uncovered 10-15 minutes until vegetables are tender.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Serve hot, garnished with chopped cilantro or parsley if desired.
